lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number 'SEG-26D-465299' does not contain an LC bank term reference. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1 footer: 'Ericsson AB' with address Mail: SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Sweden, Office: Torshamnsgatan 21-23, Kista, Stockholm
Invoice page 2 footer: 'Ericsson AB' with same address details

criteria_met: Consignor 'ERICSSON AB' identified in invoice footer as 'Ericsson AB' (issuer)
Consignee 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD.' identified in invoice 'Invoice address' and 'Customer' fields
Shipment number 6200116055 from certificate matches invoice 'Consignment No. part of Shipment No. 40000088547 part of 6200116055'
pairing_validation.motivation: Multiple pairing criteria are met: consignor matches invoice issuer, consignee matches invoice customer, and shipment number is consistent. Valid document pair.

consignor.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Mail: SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Sweden, Office: Torshamnsgatan 21-23, Kista, Stockholm

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'ERICSSON AB' anywhere in invoice files
comparison_steps.detail: The name 'Ericsson AB' is found explicitly in the invoice footer/issuer block on page 1 and page 2. The invoice is issued by Ericsson AB with matching address (Torshamnsgatan 21-23, SE-164 83 Stockholm, Sweden) and VAT no SE556056625801 confirming Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice issuer block
Land verification via VAT prefix SE and explicit 'Sweden' in address

evidence.raw_text:
Mail: SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM
Sweden

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'ERICSSON AB' at Torshamnsgatan 21-23, 164 83 Stockholm, Sweden. Invoice issuer (footer): 'Ericsson AB' at Mail: SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Sweden, Office: Torshamnsgatan 21-23, Kista, Stockholm. After normalization of case: 'ericsson ab' = 'ericsson ab'. Exact match. Country: Sweden in certificate, Sweden in invoice address + SE prefix in VAT number SE556056625801. Country MATCH. Applying rule 4.1.0 – name found explicitly in invoice. Result: MATCH.

consignee.certificate_value: ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. (FORMERLY ERICSSON INDIA GLOBAL, S/N 3RD & 4TH FLOOR BUILDING NO 7A, PHASE 3 DLF CYBER CITY SECTOR 25A, 122002 GURUGRAM GURUGRAM, INDIA

Certificate: 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD.' normalized to 'ericsson india private ltd'. Invoice: 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD.' normalized to 'ericsson india private ltd'. Exact match.
Certificate: INDIA. Invoice: India. After case normalization: identical.

Company name verification – exact match after case normalization

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. (FORMERLY ERICSSON INDIA GLOBAL' at S/N 3RD & 4TH FLOOR BUILDING NO 7A, PHASE 3 DLF CYBER CITY SECTOR 25A, 122002 GURUGRAM GURUGRAM, INDIA. Invoice 'Invoice address 502538': 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. (FORMERLY ERICSSON INDIA GLOBAL' at S/N 3RD & 4TH FLOOR BUILDING NO 7A, PHASE 3 DLF CYBER CITY SECTOR 25A, 122002 GURUGRAM GURUGRAM, India. Name exact match after case normalization. Address exact match. Country: INDIA vs India → identical after normalization. Result: MATCH.

goods_description.invoice_value: Telecom equipment (Information header); EQUIPPED CABINET/RackServerTPS-W027-IVAN (line item description)

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate does not contain article numbers. No article number verification needed.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing main designation in certificate and search in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate states 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice contains 'Telecom equipment' in the Information header. 'TELEOM' differs from 'Telecom' by exactly one character – the letter 'c' is missing from 'TELEOM'. This is a single character difference, likely a typo or OCR error. Applying rule 4.3.3.1 (probable typo/OCR error – single character difference).

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
Probable typo/OCR error – single character difference in identity-bearing main designation → MANUAL_REVIEW

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice Information header: 'Telecom equipment'. After case normalization: 'teleom equipment' vs 'telecom equipment'. The word 'TELEOM' vs 'Telecom' differs by exactly one character: the 'c' is missing in 'TELEOM' (TELEoM vs TELECoM). This is exactly one character missing, which constitutes a probable typo or OCR error per rule 4.3.3.1. The rule states that when the identity-bearing main designation differs by exactly one character (omitted, added, or substituted) and the difference is likely a typo/OCR error, the result should be MANUAL_REVIEW – not MISMATCH. All other context strongly supports these being the same goods: same shipment number (6200116055), same consignor (Ericsson AB), same consignee, same quantity (2 pieces), same weight. Result: MANUAL_REVIEW per rule 4.3.3.1.

rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.3.3.1 explicitly states that a single character difference that is likely a typo/OCR error should result in MANUAL_REVIEW, not MISMATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MATCH because the goods are obviously the same
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.3.3.1 explicitly states the result should be MANUAL_REVIEW for single character typo, not MATCH. Automatic approval is not permitted for typos.

quantity.invoice_value: Total gross weight Kg: 1,507.000; No. of packages: 2; Quantity: 2.00 PC

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains '1507 KG GW' – this is the primary verification quantity
comparison_steps.detail: Box 7 value: 1507 KG GW. Numeric value: 1507, unit: KG, weight category: GW (Gross Weight).

comparison_steps.description: Search for 1507 KG GW in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice states 'Total gross weight Kg: 1,507.000'. After removing thousands separator (comma as thousands separator, per rule 4.4.3.3 principles and standard English notation): 1507.000. Truncating to integer: 1507. Certificate value: 1507. Exact match. Weight category: GW in certificate, 'Total gross weight' in invoice. Category matches.
Certificate Box 6: '2 PIECES'. Invoice: 'No. of packages: 2' and line item quantity '2.00 PC'. Numeric value 2 matches in both documents.

rules_applied.description: Box 7 quantity (1507 KG GW) is the primary verification quantity
Occurrence check – 1507 KG GW found as Total gross weight Kg 1,507.000 in invoice
Numeric value verification – 1507 matches 1507.000 (allowed decimal truncation)
Weight category GW explicitly stated in certificate, Total gross weight in invoice – categories match

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7: '1507 KG GW'. Invoice: 'Total gross weight Kg: 1,507.000'. The invoice value '1,507.000' uses comma as thousands separator (English notation) and period as decimal separator. Removing thousands separator: 1507.000. This equals 1507 when truncated to the precision of the certificate value (integer). Certificate specifies GW; invoice specifies 'Total gross weight' – categories match. Primary quantity MATCH. Secondary quantity: Certificate '2 PIECES' vs Invoice 'No. of packages: 2' and line item '2.00 PC' – numeric value 2 matches. Additionally, invoice also provides Total net weight Kg: 1,067.302 which is a different value but does not contradict GW – NW is expected to be lower than GW. No contradictions found. Result: MATCH.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin field in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice line item 000100 contains a 'COO' column with value 'CZ'. COO = Country of Origin. This is an explicit origin field.
Certificate: 'Czech Republic'. Invoice: 'CZ'. CZ is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for Czech Republic. After normalization: identical.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice COO column
Country name normalization – Czech Republic ↔ CZ (ISO alpha-2 code)

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 3 Country of Origin: 'Czech Republic'. Invoice line item 000100 COO column: 'CZ'. CZ is the ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code for Czech Republic (Czechia). Per rule 4.5.4, normalization between full country name and ISO code is allowed. Czech Republic = CZ. Result: MATCH. Note: The certificate header states 'EUROPEAN UNION' which is the issuing framework, and Box 3 specifies 'Czech Republic' as the specific country of origin. Czech Republic is an EU member state, consistent with the EU certificate framework. The origin 'Czech Republic' is different from the consignor's country (Sweden), but per rule 4.5 this is perfectly valid – origin refers to where goods are manufactured, not where the consignor is located.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because origin Czech Republic differs from consignor country Sweden
rejected_hypotheses.reason_rejected: Rule 4.5 explicitly states: 'Ursprungslandet (Country of Origin) avser var VARORNA är tillverkade eller producerade — inte var avsändaren (consignor) är etablerad.' Origin and consignor country are independent.

rule_evaluation_log.outcome: No LC reference found in certificate. Standard verification applies.
Document A identified as certificate (Certificate of Origin). Document B identified as invoice (Commercial Invoice, 2 pages). Single certificate, single invoice. Clear pairing.
PASSED. Consignor 'Ericsson AB' matches invoice issuer. Consignee 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD.' matches invoice address. Shipment number 6200116055 found in both documents.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor search in all invoice files
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MATCH. 'Ericsson AB' found in invoice footer/issuer block on pages 1 and 2.
Sweden verified via explicit address 'Sweden' and VAT prefix 'SE' in SE556056625801.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Consignee identification priority – Invoice address field
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Invoice address 502538 contains ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. – primary billing field used.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching – identity-bearing main designation
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: Certificate: 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT'. Invoice header: 'Telecom equipment'. Single character difference ('c' missing). Triggered rule 4.3.3.1.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Probable typo/OCR error – single character difference
rule_evaluation_log.outcome: MANUAL_REVIEW. 'TELEOM' vs 'Telecom' differs by exactly one character (missing 'c'). Likely typo in certificate.
Box 7 contains '1507 KG GW' – used as verification-grounding quantity.
MATCH. 1507 KG GW found as Total gross weight Kg 1,507.000 in invoice.
No contradictions found. Invoice Total net weight (1067.302) is a separate category from GW and not contradicted.
MATCH. Czech Republic normalized to CZ (ISO alpha-2). Invoice COO column: CZ.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Avsändare (Ericsson AB), mottagare (Ericsson India Private Ltd.), kvantitet (1 507 kg bruttovikt) och ursprungsland (Tjeckien) stämmer överens mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Dock finns en trolig skrivfelstavning i certifikatets varubeskrivning: 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT' istället för 'Telecom equipment'. Detta behöver bekräftas manuellt.
overall_assessment.summary_of_findings: Four of five checkpoints verified successfully: consignor (MATCH), consignee (MATCH), quantity (MATCH), and country of origin (MATCH). The goods description checkpoint requires manual review due to a single character discrepancy: certificate states 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT' while invoice states 'Telecom equipment'. The missing 'c' in 'TELEOM' is a probable typo per rule 4.3.3.1.
blocking_issues: Goods description: Certificate states 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT' while invoice states 'Telecom equipment' – single character difference (missing 'c'), probable typo requiring manual confirmation.

consistency_check.detail: One checkpoint (goods_description) has MANUAL_REVIEW status. No MISMATCH found. Overall result MANUAL_REVIEW is consistent with having at least one checkpoint at MANUAL_REVIEW. Confidence 0.65 on goods description is below 0.85 threshold, confirming MANUAL_REVIEW is required per confidence floor rule (section 7).

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.invoice_value: Ericsson AB, Mail: SE-164 83 STOCKHOLM, Sweden, Office: Torshamnsgatan 21-23, Kista, Stockholm, VAT no: SE556056625801
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – consignor name found explicitly in invoice issuer block
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'ERICSSON AB' kan identifieras i fakturans utställarblock (footer) som 'Ericsson AB' med adress Torshamnsgatan 21-23, SE-164 83 Stockholm, Sweden. Företagsnamnet matchar exakt efter normalisering av versaler/gemener. Land (Sweden) bekräftat via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. (FORMERLY ERICSSON INDIA GLOBAL, S/N 3RD & 4TH FLOOR BUILDING NO 7A, PHASE 3 DLF CYBER CITY SECTOR 25A, 122002 GURUGRAM GURUGRAM, INDIA
sections.invoice_value: Invoice address 502538: ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD. (FORMERLY ERICSSON INDIA GLOBAL, S/N 3RD & 4TH FLOOR BUILDING NO 7A, PHASE 3 DLF CYBER CITY SECTOR 25A, 122002 GURUGRAM GURUGRAM, India
sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2 – Invoice address är primärt faktureringsfält; namnverifiering 4.2.2
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'ERICSSON INDIA PRIVATE LTD.' kan identifieras exakt i fakturans primära faktureringsfält ('Invoice address 502538'). Företagsnamn, adress och land (INDIA/India) överensstämmer exakt efter normalisering av versaler.

sections.rule_applied: Sannolikt stavfel/OCR-fel med enstaka teckenavvikelse (4.3.3.1) – 'TELEOM' vs 'Telecom' saknar bokstaven 'c'
sections.motivation: Certifikatets varubeskrivning 'TELEOM EQUIPMENT' jämförs med fakturans informationshuvud 'Telecom equipment'. Skillnaden är exakt ett tecken: bokstaven 'c' saknas i 'TELEOM' (jämfört med 'Telecom'). Detta bedöms som ett sannolikt skrivfel. Regel 4.3.3.1 tillämpas: enstaka teckenavvikelse i den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen ger MANUAL_REVIEW, inte MISMATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Total gross weight Kg: 1,507.000; No. of packages: 2; Line item: 2.00 PC
sections.rule_applied: Förekomstkontroll (4.4.1) – Box 7-värde identifierat i fakturans Total gross weight
sections.motivation: Certifikatets primära kvantitet (Box 7): 1507 KG GW. Fakturan anger 'Total gross weight Kg: 1,507.000'. Efter borttagning av tusentalsavskiljare: 1507.000 = 1507. Viktkategori GW matchar 'Total gross weight'. Sekundär kvantitet '2 PIECES' matchar fakturans 'No. of packages: 2' och 'Quantity 2.00 PC'. Inga motsägelser identifierade.

sections.rule_applied: Landnormalisering (4.5.4) – Czech Republic ↔ CZ (ISO alpha-2 kod)
sections.motivation: Certifikatets ursprungsland 'Czech Republic' kan identifieras i fakturans COO-kolumn som 'CZ' (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 kod för Tjeckien). Normalisering av fullständigt landsnamn till ISO-kod är uttryckligen tillåten.

output_quality_checks.notes: One checkpoint (goods_description) at MANUAL_REVIEW with confidence 0.65 (below 0.85 threshold). This correctly triggers overall MANUAL_REVIEW per confidence floor rule. All other checkpoints MATCH with high confidence.
